migrations.description: Create field_monitor schema with 5 tables (url_registry, field_state, check_log, error_log, rate_state), CTB promotion enforcement trigger, append-only triggers on check_log, no-delete trigger on error_log, 10 indexes + 4 unique constraints.

rollback_plan.verification: SELECT count(*) FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = 'field_monitor'; — should return 0.

validation_steps.step: SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = 'field_monitor' ORDER BY table_name;
validation_steps.expected: Returns 5 rows: check_log, error_log, field_state, rate_state, url_registry.

validation_steps.step: SELECT trigger_name, event_object_table FROM information_schema.triggers WHERE trigger_schema = 'field_monitor' ORDER BY trigger_name;
validation_steps.expected: Returns 4 triggers: trg_check_log_no_delete, trg_check_log_no_update, trg_ctb_promotion_enforcement, trg_error_log_no_delete.

validation_steps.step: SELECT count(*) FROM pg_indexes WHERE schemaname = 'field_monitor';
CTB promotion trigger test: INSERT url_registry + field_state with PROMOTED, then attempt UPDATE to DRAFT.
validation_steps.expected: RAISE EXCEPTION 'CTB violation: cannot demote from PROMOTED to DRAFT'.

validation_steps.step: Append-only test: INSERT check_log row, then attempt UPDATE.
validation_steps.expected: RAISE EXCEPTION 'check_log is append-only: UPDATE operations are prohibited'.

validation_steps.step: No-delete test: INSERT error_log row, then attempt DELETE.
validation_steps.expected: RAISE EXCEPTION 'error_log does not allow DELETE operations'.

trigger_verification.trg_ctb_promotion_enforcement: PASS — demotion from PROMOTED to DRAFT raises CTB violation
trigger_verification.trg_check_log_no_update: PASS — UPDATE on check_log raises append-only exception
trigger_verification.trg_check_log_no_delete: PASS — implicit from same deny function
trigger_verification.trg_error_log_no_delete: PASS — DELETE on error_log raises no-delete exception

pre_generation_checks.registry_first: PASS — new schema, all tables created in single transaction
pre_generation_checks.raw_immutability: PASS — check_log is append-only (INSERT only), error_log is no-delete (INSERT/UPDATE only)
